title: R-cell calculator
text:
Install quarto (depends on your OS)

MacOS: brew install quarto

Create a new quarto project:

quarto create r-web

Select the kind of project, in this case I selected website
Add quarto-live to the project:

quarto add r-wasm/quarto-live

create live.qmd file

title: r-web
text:
This is a Quarto website.
To learn more about Quarto websites visit https://quarto.org/docs/websites.
Go to live
